common.footer: Payroll Copilot — Deterministic compliance validation for Israeli payroll.

landing.title: Validate payslips. Answer employee-rights questions with approved sources.
landing.lead: Payroll Copilot combines deterministic payroll validation with a source-bound assistant. Compliance decisions are made by the rule engine, not by AI guesswork.
landing.assistantBody: Ask about payroll rules and employee rights using approved internal sources only.
landing.validateBody: Upload a payslip and optional supporting documents to receive a structured validation report.

assistant.title: Payroll Assistant
assistant.intro: Ask payroll and employee-rights questions using approved internal sources only.
assistant.empty: Ask a payroll or employee-rights question.
assistant.unavailable: The Payroll Assistant is temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
assistant.guardrailBlocked: This request could not be processed.
assistant.guardrailLimited: No approved source was found for this question.
assistant.noSource: No approved source was found in the Payroll Assistant knowledge base.
assistant.suggested1: What documents are needed to validate a payslip?
assistant.suggested2: How should overtime be reflected on a payslip?
assistant.suggested3: What is the difference between a validation warning and a critical issue?

validate.title: Validate My Payslip
validate.intro: Upload your payslip and optional supporting documents. Validation results are produced by the deterministic payroll rule engine.
validate.validating: Uploading documents and running validation. This may take a moment.
validate.documentLanguageHint: Used as metadata for future multilingual OCR. Extraction is not connected yet.
validate.ocrNotConnected: Multilingual OCR extraction is planned and not connected yet. Uploaded documents are stored; payslip fields are not parsed by language.
validate.payslipRequired: A payslip is required before validation can run.

slots.payslipWhy: Required to validate salary, deductions, overtime, and payslip line items.
slots.attendanceWhy: Helps verify working hours, overtime, and leave when attendance checks are connected.
slots.contractWhy: Allows validation against contractual obligations when contract analysis is connected.
slots.nationalIdWhy: Supports identity-dependent tax and benefit checks when those validations are connected.

uploadErrors.duplicate: This file has already been selected for upload.
uploadErrors.unsupportedType: Unsupported file type for this document slot ({{type}}).
uploadErrors.invalidPdf: The PDF file appears to be corrupted or invalid.
uploadErrors.encryptedPdf: Password-protected PDF files are not supported.
uploadErrors.injection: The uploaded file contains unsupported instruction-like content.

report.noIssues: No potential issues were identified in the completed rule checks.
report.allAreasEvaluated: All currently supported validation areas were evaluated.
report.checksPassed_one: {{count}} payroll rule check completed with no potential issues.
report.checksPassed_other: {{count}} payroll rule checks completed with no potential issues.
report.summaryClean_one: {{count}} payroll rule check completed with no potential issues identified.
report.summaryClean_other: {{count}} payroll rule checks completed with no potential issues identified.
report.summaryIssues_one: {{passed}} payroll rule checks completed. {{issues}} potential issue require review.
report.summaryIssues_other: {{passed}} payroll rule checks completed. {{issues}} potential issues require review.
report.recCritical: Review this item with your payroll administrator before approving payment.
report.recWarning: Verify the payslip detail and supporting records for this line item.
report.recInfo: Review for completeness and keep supporting records on file.
report.explainNote: Explanation based on existing deterministic findings only.
report.explainFailed: An explanation could not be generated for this finding.
